name: feature
description: Standard feature workflow: design → implement → test → document

tasks.content: Design the feature — define interface and data flow
tasks.criteria: Interface defined. Edge cases considered. Design documented.
Core functionality works for happy path and edge cases
Unit tests cover core logic. Integration test covers end-to-end flow.

tasks.content: Document the feature — update README/API docs
tasks.criteria: Usage documented. API changes reflected in docs.
